name: capture-to-task
title: Capture & Create
description: Capture a screen region and create a Google Task or Calendar event with Claude
author: BSoDium

commands.name: capture-to-task
commands.title: Capture to Task
commands.description: Select a region of your screen and add it as a Google Task

commands.name: capture-to-calendar
commands.title: Capture to Calendar
commands.description: Select a region of your screen and add it as a Calendar event

preferences.name: anthropicApiKey
preferences.title: Anthropic API Key
preferences.description: Your Anthropic API key — stored securely in Keychain

preferences.name: calendarName
preferences.title: Default Calendar
preferences.description: Name of the macOS Calendar to add events to by default (must match exactly)

preferences.name: gcpClientId
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console (Web application type). Authorized redirect URI must be: https://raycast.com/redirect?packageName=Extension

preferences.name: gcpClientSecret
preferences.title: Google OAuth Client Secret
preferences.description: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret shown on the same GCP credentials page as the Client ID
